9.description: join municipality and county names to the result

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

1.description: resolve Kristiansand municipality geometry and identifiers

2.description: get 200-year storm-surge areas filtered by municipality geometry

4.description: find buildings within 50 metres of storm-surge areas

5.description: calculate distance from each building to nearest storm-surge area

6.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

7.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker

9.description: join municipality and county names for final reporting

1.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade AS geom FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Kristiansand%';

2.sql: SELECT omrade AS geom FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_GeomFromEWKT('SRID=25833;<MUNICIPALITY_GEOMETRY>'));

1.description: resolve Kristiansand municipality geometry and identifiers

2.description: retrieve 200-year storm-surge areas within Kristiansand municipality extent

4.description: identify buildings within 50 metres of 200-year storm-surge areas

5.description: calculate distance from each building to the nearest storm-surge area

6.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

7.description: sort buildings by distance ascending, then by building ID ascending for tie-breaker

9.description: join municipality and county names to the result
